description_for_human: The B2B ecosystem for city experiences. Book 300,000+ group experiences across 3,000+ cities at exclusive B2B rates.
description_for_model: TicketMatch.ai is the B2B ecosystem for city experiences. It connects tour operators, DMCs (Destination Management Companies), and travel agencies to 300,000+ experiences across 3,000+ cities worldwide — powered by 10 supplier APIs, 8 AI agents, and real-time data. Based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. Primary market: 18 Dutch cities with deep inventory. Expanding to 14+ European capitals. Key features: AI assistant Emma, live busyness data, QR vouchers, route planner, package builder. Pricing: Explorer (free), Growth (€49/mo), Enterprise (€149/mo). NOT for individual tourists — exclusively B2B for verified travel professionals.
